context: Tests matrix build generation with correct fail-fast behaviour, SHA-pinned actions, artifact upload conventions, and job dependency chaining. Maps to skill instructions on matrix strategy, artifact sharing, and action versioning.

checklist.name: SHA-pinned actions
checklist.description: Every `uses:` step references a full 40-character SHA (not a tag or branch name)

checklist.name: No explicit fail-fast false
checklist.description: The matrix strategy does NOT include `fail-fast: false` without an accompanying explanatory comment — the default (true) or an intentional override with comment is acceptable

checklist.name: Matrix covers OS and Python version
checklist.description: The matrix definition includes at least two operating systems AND at least two Python version values

checklist.name: Top-level permissions block
checklist.description: The workflow contains a top-level `permissions:` block (not absent entirely)

checklist.name: Artifact named with SHA
checklist.description: The `actions/upload-artifact` step names the artifact using `${{ github.sha }}` or equivalent unique run identifier

checklist.name: Upload artifact v4
checklist.description: Uses `actions/upload-artifact@` with a version that is v4 or newer (not v1, v2, or v3)

checklist.name: Build job depends on test job
checklist.description: The build/artifact job has a `needs:` field referencing the matrix test job, so it only runs after all matrix tests pass

checklist.name: Concurrency block present
checklist.description: The workflow includes a `concurrency:` block with `cancel-in-progress: true`

checklist.name: Job timeout set
checklist.description: At least one job has a `timeout-minutes:` field
